hero.title: Vietnam Awaits
hero.subtitle: Discover breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural heritage across Vietnam and beyond
hero.searchPlaceholder: Where do you want to go?

aboutUs.heroSubtitle: We are passionate about creating unforgettable travel experiences that connect people with extraordinary destinations.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc1: Pathora was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to make travel accessible, enjoyable, and meaningful. Our team of passionate locals and seasoned professionals work together to craft tours that reveal the true soul of each destination.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc2: From bustling cities to serene landscapes, we handle every detail so you can focus on what matters most — creating memories. With over 92,000 happy travelers and a 98% satisfaction rate, we continue to set the standard for quality travel experiences.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Browse our curated tour packages and find the perfect journey for your next adventure.

values.globalExpertiseDesc: With deep knowledge of local cultures and landscapes, we bring authentic experiences to every journey.
values.safeTrustedDesc: Licensed operators, vetted guides, and comprehensive travel insurance for your peace of mind.
values.tailoredForYouDesc: From solo travelers to family groups, we customize itineraries to match your interests and pace.
values.seamlessExperienceDesc: End-to-end support from booking to completion, so you can focus on the adventure.

timeline.foundedDesc: Started as a small local tour operator in Hanoi with a dream to share Vietnam's beauty with the world.
timeline.first10kDesc: Reached our first major milestone of 10,000 happy travelers and expanded operations to 3 major cities.
timeline.expanded60Desc: Grew our network to cover 60+ destinations across Vietnam, Laos, Cambodia, Thailand, and beyond.
timeline.digitalFirstDesc: Launched our online booking platform making it easier than ever to discover and book tours instantly.
timeline.happy92kDesc: Celebrated serving over 92,000 travelers with a 98% satisfaction rating and counting.

videoShowcase.label: Experience Vietnam
videoShowcase.caption: Vietnam Awaits
videoShowcase.subcaption: Discover breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural heritage

policies.introPrefix: At Pathora, we believe in complete transparency. This document outlines our policies for bookings, payments, cancellations, and more to ensure a smooth experience for all travelers.
policies.introSuffix: We are committed to providing clear and fair terms for every journey you book with us.
policies.ctaDescription: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any policy-related questions.
